name: schema-registry-dag-schema-version-reader
description: T196 SchemaVersionReader — VALIDATION archetype. Reads versioned schema by schemaId+version. Returns pinned version. Never returns 'current' — always pinned.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: schemaId+version required params, always returns pinned version, never returns current/latest, read-only operation
Retrieve VALIDATION arch pattern + schema-version-pin + read-only-query + pinned-version-read patterns for T196
Break T196 into: validate schemaId+version params → query DATABASE for exact version match → return SchemaVersionRecord with pinned version field → never resolve to latest

Generate schema-version-reader.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, requires both schemaId AND version query params. Queries DATABASE by exact schemaId+version key. NEVER accepts 'latest' or 'current' as version value — reject with VERSION_REQUIRED error. Returns pinned SchemaVersionRecord. Read-only — no mutations.
Named check validation: schema_id_and_version_required, rejects_latest_current_version, returns_pinned_record, read_only_no_mutations, version_required_error_on_missing
Score generated code 0-100 against T196 iron rules: pinned version enforcement, rejection of current/latest, read-only compliance, correct param validation
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=exact-version-lookup+pinned-return+reject-latest, rejected=accepts-latest-string OR returns-current-schema OR missing-version-param-accepted. curriculumTier=1.
